nuggets.text: The official Sora page says you can start from a prompt or upload an image to create videos.
OpenAI's Sora page describes output styles as cinematic, animated, photorealistic, or surreal.
The Sora product page says videos include hyperreal motion and sound.
The official page says music, sound effects, and dialogue are automatically included to complete scenes.
Sora's Characters feature lets you cast yourself or friends in videos and control how or when the character is used.
The Sora page also highlights remixing an existing creation by swapping characters, changing the vibe, adding scenes, or extending the story.
OpenAI's pricing docs list sora-2 video output at $0.10 per second for 720x1280 portrait or 1280x720 landscape.
The same pricing docs list sora-2-pro at $0.30 per second for 720p portrait or landscape output.
OpenAI's pricing docs list higher-resolution sora-2-pro output at $0.50 per second for 1024x1792 portrait or 1792x1024 landscape.
The official pricing model makes Sora better suited to premium generation use cases than to low-cost batch publishing.
